headers.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; img-src 'self' data: https: blob:; font-src 'self' data: https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; connect-src 'self' https: wss:; media-src 'self' https:; object-src 'none'; frame-ancestors 'self'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
